top_signals.title: Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with government directive
top_signals.summary: Anthropic said it disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with an export control directive from the U.S. government.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
